title: bus.tengine.gate.skipped v1
description: When: An agent closes a bead without executing all six gates (e.g. tests, lint, build). Source: /tengine. Emitted as a compliance violation to alert operators that a bead may have been prematurely closed without meeting quality criteria.

host.description: Hostname of the machine that generated this event.

bead_id.description: Bead identifier that was closed without completing all gates.

gate_number.description: Numeric identifier of the gate that was skipped (1-6).

gate_name.description: Human-readable name of the gate that was skipped, e.g. 'tests', 'lint', 'build'.

agent_name.description: Name of the agent that closed the bead without passing all gates.
